triggered_passive.description: Applies freeze debuff (0.5s) to target on critical strike
Triggers an explosion in a 3m radius for 40% weapon damage on kill
Cleanses one CC effect and grants 1s CC-immunity on being CCed
Returns thorns damage equal to 20% of attack damage on being hit
Counter-attacks for 25% weapon damage on successful block
Cleanses one CC effect and grants 1s CC-immunity on being CCed
Grants +15% elemental resistance for 2s after being hit
Passive: +8% damage bonus to gear-element skill damage

wr_bracket_details.note: pass inferred from generation_shipped + gamora validation
